name: Local Lending Oklahoma
description_short: Local Lending Oklahoma is a mortgage lender serving the Oklahoma City region offering home purchase, refinance, and equity cash-out loans with personalized service from local brokers.
description_long:
Local Lending Oklahoma is a mortgage lending company based in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, operating under the leadership of Dean (primary loan officer) and his assistant Tanya. The company positions itself as a community-focused lender committed to serving first-time homebuyers and existing homeowners throughout the greater Oklahoma City metropolitan area, including Edmond, Piedmont, Yukon, Mustang, Tuttle, Newcastle, Blanchard, Norman, Moore, Choctaw, and Deer Creek.

The company offers three primary mortgage services: home purchase loans for first-time and repeat buyers, refinancing options to help homeowners lower monthly payments or access equity, and cash-out refinancing for homeowners seeking to leverage their home equity. They provide a free quick quote tool requiring only nine questions and no SSN, a secured borrower portal for application management, and a free multi-page home valuation report. The company emphasizes technology integration alongside personalized service, positioning themselves as combining cutting-edge tools with the human touch of local brokers.

Local Lending Oklahoma distinguishes itself through responsive customer service and accessibility, with staff available evenings and weekends according to client testimonials. The company emphasizes streamlined processes designed to close loans on time and reduce friction in the mortgage application process. Their marketing heavily features client testimonials from named individuals (Kellee O., Ben P., Troy T.) praising Dean and Tanya's responsiveness, accommodations, and ability to save clients money on monthly payments.

Based on available information, the company appears to be a regional mortgage broker or lender with a small team centered around one primary loan officer. While client testimonials are positive, there is limited third-party verification of licensing, regulatory compliance, loan volume, or competitive rate positioning. The company website lacks information about specific loan products (FHA, VA, conventional), interest rate ranges, fees, or comparison data with competitors.
pros: Free quick quote requires no SSN and no obligations—just 9 questions
Provides free multi-page home valuation reports to applicants
Staff available nights and weekends for borrower support and issue resolution
Personalized service with named loan officer (Dean) and dedicated assistant (Tanya)
Clients report significant savings ($150/month mentioned) through refinancing
Serves first-time homebuyers, refinancers, and cash-out equity scenarios
Secured borrower portal for online application and loan management
cons: Website lacks specific information about loan types offered (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, etc.)
No interest rates, APRs, fees, or pricing information disclosed on website
Limited information about regulatory licensing, certifications, or third-party ratings
Small team size (appears to be primarily one loan officer, Dean) may limit availability and capacity
No comparison tools or rate shopping capabilities mentioned; website focuses on testimonials rather than concrete product details
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Oklahoma City metropolitan area seeking personalized guidance
Homeowners refinancing existing mortgages to lower monthly payments
Borrowers seeking to access home equity through cash-out refinancing
diagnosis: Local Lending Oklahoma is best for Oklahoma City-area borrowers seeking a personalized mortgage experience with accessible local service and responsiveness. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing, product details, and third-party verification—borrowers should request detailed rate quotes and loan terms before committing and verify the company's licensing and credentials independently.
services: Free quick quote tool (no SSN required)
Loan consultation and guidance through closing
Responsive customer service including evenings and weekends
